Archived notes from eyewitnesses who have suffered at the hands of all manner of supernatural creatures. Found in the Eastlake archives, near CENSORED

⋮ ⌗ ┆ :: ⸝⸝ « One project. One weird boy. What a combo… »

╰┈➤ ANYPOV ! 𐔌՞ ܸ.ˬ.ܸ՞𐦯 CollegeStudent!user x vampire!Wifies

ᰔ ˎˊ˗ ᯓ ✉️ :: CREATOR’S NOTES :

Hi! First off, this bot is part of the “Biters. The Eastlake Chronology” series—it's based on Stephenie Meyer's Twilight, as well as a couple of similar analog horror stories like The Mandela Catalogue, The Magnitogorsk Region (aka Магнитошахтинская область on Russian), and others.

I should note that the bot focuses mostly on atmosphere, and inner lore of the bot.

There’s a backstory here, and I want to try creating a project with some lore rather than just releasing bots. ;3

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

SCENARIO :: ദ്ദി◝ ⩊ ◜.ᐟ

A new student recently transferred to Eastlake College — Wifies. He’s weird, unsociable, but extremely smart. However, there’s clearly something off about him!

When the teacher assigned Wifies and {{user}} to work on a project together, they agreed to meet in the library. What could possibly go wrong?

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

Don't forget to leave a review for the bot and/or give it a like! I'm doing my best ! :3

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌
